name: Beech Mountain Club
description: Come play pickleball at Beech Mountain Club in Beech Mountain, NC! There are 10 outdoor clay and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Buckeye Recreation Center
description: Buckeye Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Beech Mountain, NC. There are 7 asphalt courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms.

name: ELK RIVER POA
description: Come play pickleball at ELK RIVER POA in Banner Elk, NC! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, trainers or lessons, youth programming, and a pro shop or equipment store.

name: Lodges of Eagles Nest
description: Restrooms nearby. Accessible to homeowners and their guests only with access codes(s).

name: The Summit
description: The Summit is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Boone, NC. There are 6 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Watauga Community Recreation Center
description: Watauga Community Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Boone, NC. There are 6 courts. 4 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Yonahlossee Racquet Club
description: Come play pickleball at Yonahlossee Racquet Club in Boone, NC! There are 9 clay and hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
